mismatch_triage.justification: The difference in timing (every physics step vs. each coupling step) can be managed through configuration.
3D and 1D vertical dimensions are incompatible for direct integration.
The hardware specification can be adjusted to match the host WRF requirements.
The open-source nature of WRF components can be aligned with the inherited license.
Both models use Fortran, so the difference in additional languages (C) is not a blocker.
The semantic differences can be resolved through configuration and parameter alignment.
The descriptions are semantically similar enough to be aligned through configuration.
The keywords are semantically similar enough to be aligned through configuration.
The scopes are semantically similar enough to be aligned through configuration.
The software environment can be adjusted to match the WRF physics requirements.
The temporal coverage can be aligned through configuration.

mismatches.why_it_blocks_integration: Direct integration of 3D and 1D vertical dimensions is not feasible.
mismatches.proposed_fix: Implement a dimensionality reduction or interpolation method.

data_transform.example: Use linear interpolation to map 3D data to 1D vertical slices.
